sglang.title: Add Gemma2
sglang.author: Ying1123
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Logits aligned with Huggingface when using float16. Our default is bfloat16.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Use templated datasource in grafana.json to allow automatic imports
vllm.author: frittentheke
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Use templated datasource in grafana.json to allow automatic imports
This is somewhat of a followup to #4711 which introducted a input variable to allow setting the datasource on import. Unfortunately this only works when the dashboard is imported via the Grafana UI.
It's common to e.g. import dashbo

vllm.title: [Frontend] Continuous usage stats in OpenAI completion API

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implements #5708
See issue for detailed description.

Scipy is required for

           from scipy import sparse 
        
    
  


but is no longer installed with the dependencies.

This pr fixes t

vllm.title: [Docs] Fix readthedocs for tag build
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
https://readthedocs.org/projects/vllm/builds/24917886/

Readthedocs will first build html successfully on tag, then run into file not found when building pdf, because template is already remvoed.

vllm.title: Update wheel builds to strip debug
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
vllm/.github/workflows/publish.yml
    
    
         Line 86
      in
      79d406e
    
  
  
    

        
          
           CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE: Release # do not compile with debug symbol to reduce wheel size 
        
    
  


We need this flag so the final wheel size is smaller.

vllm.title: Fix release wheel build env var
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Take 2, set the env in run

vllm.title: Move release wheel env var to Dockerfile instead
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The env var setup in release pipeline step is not working properly, adding it to sscache compilation job instead.

vllm.title: [Doc] Reorganize Supported Models by Type
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR modifies the supported models page by their types for better organization. In the future, we can add more subsubsections for embeddings models, encoder-decoder, audio text models, etc.
